Name: Chris McCarthy
Description: Chris McCarthy was a S. H. I. E. L. D. agent and played a big role in the introduction of the newest Ant-Man. He was in love with fellow agent Veronica King and a very loyal and dedicated agent to his task within the S. H. I. E. L. D. organization. Chris McCarthy was created by Robert Kirkman and Phil Hester and first appeared in #The Irredeemable Ant-Man issue 1 (2006).
